description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a natural grain and a darkened grip area. The head of the axe is large and solid, with a matte black finish and a single, broad, silver-colored cutting edge. The blade is wide and slightly convex, designed for chopping, and the poll is flat and squared off, suitable for striking. The handle appears ergonomically shaped for a secure grip, with a pronounced curve at the end to prevent slipping. The mounting of the blade to the handle is traditional, with the head fitted over the top of the handle. No visible markings, engravings, or labels are present on the axe.
description: A sturdy hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a broad, black axe head featuring a single silver blade edge.
description_view_0: The axe is shown from the side, highlighting the curved wooden handle and the wide, silver-edged blade.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed from the top, showing the thickness of the black axe head and the narrow profile of the blade.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the same curved handle and the broad blade, with the poll and edge clearly visible.
description_view_3: The axe is seen from the bottom, emphasizing the flat poll and the alignment of the handle with the head.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with visible grain, ergonomic grip, and a rounded end; oval cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad blade with a convex edge, flat poll, and no beard; matte black finish with a silver cutting edge.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the head fitted over the top of the handle.
